faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Bayside?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our technicians use EPA-approved products and proven safety protocols to eliminate hornets while minimizing risk to your household. faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than yellow jackets and most wasps, build paper-like nests often in trees or under eaves, and can be more aggressive when defending their colony. While all three can sting multiple times, hornets deliver more painful stings and typically require professional removal. Our Bayside technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all stinging insect nests.
